title: Adapter impl declaration
description: Formal schema for an adapter impl provision per D16 (adapter kind). Adapters integrate a workspace with external surfaces via a single protocol-or-transport (extension-registered per D2 strict reading + D29 namespacing). Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (e.g., that protocol-or-transport resolves to a registered protocol; that required substrate capabilities are advertised by some bound substrate) is out of scope per D28.

id.description: Stable adapter identifier (D16). Vocabulary-identifier per D34.

protocol-or-transport.description: Single protocol identifier this adapter speaks (D16). No specific protocol is listed at framework-core per D2 strict reading; values are extension-registered, fully-qualified per D29.

required-substrate-capabilities.description: Substrate capability identifiers the adapter needs (D16). Required slot; may be []. Framework validates at boot per D30 capability satisfaction.

declared-event-emissions.description: Events the adapter can emit into the workspace event chain (D16). Required slot; may be [].

declared-event-consumptions.description: Events the adapter consumes / surfaces as workspace events (D16). Required slot; may be [].
